title: Infosys Foundation Commits over INR 48 Crore to Maternal and Child Healthcare in Rural Karnataka
detailed_summary: Infosys Foundation announced a CSR collaboration with Prashanthi Balamandira Trust to support Sri Sathya Sai Sarla Memorial Hospital in rural Karnataka. The Foundation pledged over INR 48 crore to improve maternal and child healthcare infrastructure and operational support, with the initiative expected to benefit over 8,000 individuals annually through free care.

key_facts.fact: Infosys Foundation collaborated with Prashanthi Balamandira Trust to support Sri Sathya Sai Sarla Memorial Hospital in providing free medical care to underprivileged women, infants, and children in rural Karnataka.

Infosys Foundation pledged a grant of over INR 48 crore to augment healthcare infrastructure and facilities in maternal and childcare services, with a portion of the grant also covering operational costs.
The initiative is expected to benefit over 8,000 deserving individuals annually.

esg_or_csr_items.item: Infosys Foundation pledged support to Prashanthi Balamandira Trust for free maternal and child healthcare at Sri Sathya Sai Sarla Memorial Hospital in rural Karnataka.
